title: Stone's Cookbook
body:
This mod add some food.

Welcome to the Github repository to submit suggestions or feedback issue.

need Fabric API.

There is no plan for port the mod to Forge or lower Minecraft version.if you want do it,please mail 3011499719@qq.com for inform.I will do my best to support.

Chinese WIKI https://www.mcmod.cn/item/list/8569-1.html (now in 1.2.2)
